title: HideNSeek
description: Simpliest Hide & Seek plugin for your friends! Inspired by MarweX
body:
[![Discord](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.jsdelivr.net%2Fnpm%2F%40intergrav%2Fdevins-badges%403%2Fassets%2Fcozy%2Fsocial%2Fdiscord-plural_vector.svg&n=-1)](https://discord.gg/yyDnBhH8Zb)

![header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ae45c48117715f5818d1ffc5397f2c050c65913_0.webp)

This one plugin for Hide And Seek is a bit different from most other plugins, mods, or datapacks for Hide and Seek. It's designed for players who want to enjoy the game with friends without needing to set up an arena, spawn points, or anything complicated. (Inspired by czech Youtuber MarweX)

![config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f4e7319fde447f71048d0d573219e7853ea59f2_0.webp)
My plugin is simple. Just upload a map to your server, invite some players, and run the command:
/hs start — that’s all you need!

🔧 In-game configuration commands:
- /hs time wait/game <time in minutes>
- /hs glowing on/off <interval in minutes> (This function is that every def. 1 minute hiders get glowing for 1 second)
- /hs setseeker <player name>/random(Choosen player resets every game round) <another plyer name>,...
- /hs mode <mode name>

![features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0984a4369cd6de1b9ec7a31f7c9eec593176f41d_0.webp)
🎮 Available modes:
- Normal — If the seeker kills a hider, the hider dies and is out of the game.
- Zombie — If the seeker kills a hider, the hider becomes a seeker too!

🗣️Supported Languages:
- English (en-us)
- Czech (cs-cz)
- German (de-de)
- Spanish (es-es)
- French (fr-fr)
- Russian (ru-ru)
- Portuguese (pt-br)
